description: Fix Calendar Card-Fitting Bug - Rewrite the event card CSS in day/week views so cards fit perfectly within their time-row boundaries. Fix card height/padding/overflow so text does not spill or get cut off. Ensure short events (15-30 min) are still readable, long events span cleanly.
steps: In frontend/app/dashboard/calendar/page.tsx, modify the TimeBlock component's CSS. Current issues: the card uses absolute positioning with top/height based on ROW_HEIGHT=64px (h-16). The card has px-2 py-1 padding plus border which can cause overflow. For short events (15-30 min), the height is max(24, (duration/60)*64) = 16-32px which is too tight for text + time display.

Fix the height calculation: For 15min events height = max(28, (15/60)*64) = max(28,16) = 28px. For 30min events = max(28,32) = 32px. Change min-height from 24px to 28px. Add overflow-hidden with text-ellipsis.

Fix padding: reduce vertical padding from py-1 (4px top+bottom = 8px total) to py-0.5 (2px top+bottom = 4px total) for short events. Use conditional padding: if clampedHeight < 40 use py-0.5 px-1.5, otherwise py-1.5 px-2.

Fix text display: for events shorter than 36px height, show only the title (no time). For events between 36-50px, show title + time in one line. For events over 50px, show title on first line, time on second line. Currently the threshold is clampedHeight > 36 for showing time.

Ensure the card never exceeds its time boundaries: add max-height constraint that equals the calculated height. Add overflow-hidden to prevent text spill. Use line-clamp-1 for title text in all cases.
Fix the border adding extra pixels: change from 'border border-accent-500/30' to 'border-l-2 border-l-accent-500' (left accent stripe only) to save vertical space and look cleaner.
Test by verifying the build passes with 'cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm run build'
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds with no errors
npm run lint shows no errors
TimeBlock component uses conditional padding based on event duration
Short events (15-30 min) show only title with compact styling
Long events span cleanly without text overflow
Cards use overflow-hidden to prevent content spill
Left accent stripe replaces full border for space efficiency
